ItacPersonItem.Notes: Founder of the Stravaganti in Candia. For the dates, see Gian Carlo Persio, La nobilissima barriera della Canea. Poema cretese del 1594, Intr.,, testo critico e commento a cura di Cristiano Luciani, Venezia, 1994.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
